title: Dropdown colors
excerpt: It is great that you can hover over the color options and see what the color names are but then once you assign a color to a dropdown label you no longer get that color description? This makes it very difficult to use th…

posts.author: Marko1 (Mark Badorini)
posts.cookedHtml: It is great that you can hover over the color options and see what the color names are but then once you assign a color to a dropdown label you no longer get that color description? This makes it very difficult to use the same color on multiple columns for the same topic.
